tech: Barcode Design, QR Code Systems, ERP Integration, Label Printers, RFID Tags
title: Barcode & QR Label Systems
description: Designed and implemented barcode and QR label systems integrated with ERP workflows. At DhakaThai AlcoMaxx PLC, scaled label output from 2,500 to 8,000+ daily by automating bundle labeling through the Weight Checker system. At Keya Group, managed RFID tag generation and barcode systems for RMG factory operations.
